---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
---
title: "tximport_all"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-10"
---
```


```{r}

# Install packages (only needs to run once)
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install(c("tximport", "DESeq2", "rtracklayer"))
install.packages("rlang")

library(tximport)
library(DESeq2)
library(rtracklayer)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
```

```{r}
# Build tx2gene mapping from GTF (only needs to run once)
gtf <- rtracklayer::import("Mus_musculus.GRCm39.109.gtf")

tx_gtf <- gtf[!is.na(mcols(gtf)$transcript_id)]

tx2gene <- data.frame(
  TXNAME = gsub("\\.\\d+$", "", mcols(tx_gtf)$transcript_id),  # strip transcript version
  GENEID = mcols(tx_gtf)$gene_id
)

tx2gene <- tx2gene[!duplicated(tx2gene$TXNAME), ]

write.csv(tx2gene, "/Volumes/Sabrina/tx2gene.csv", row.names = FALSE)

head(tx2gene)
```

```{r}
# Define sample names and their Salmon quant folders
samples <- c(
  "03-11-2O_young",
  "06-10-2O_old",
  "08-11-2O_young",
  "13-10-2O_young",
  "18-08-2O_old",
  "23-05-2O_old",
  "29-09-2O_old",
  "30-06-2O_young"
)

salmon_base_dir <- "/Volumes/Sabrina/aligned_quant/salmon_quant_v2"
output_dir <- "/Volumes/Sabrina/tximport_results"
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

tx2gene <- read_csv("/Volumes/Sabrina/tx2gene.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Run tximport for every sample and export counts + abundance
for (sample in samples) {

  salmon_file <- file.path(salmon_base_dir, paste0("trimmed_", sample), "quant.sf")

  sf <- read_tsv(salmon_file, show_col_types = FALSE)
  sf$TXNAME_nover <- sub("\\.\\d+$", "", sf$Name)

  tx2gene_subset <- tx2gene %>% filter(TXNAME %in% sf$TXNAME_nover)
  tx2gene_subset <- tx2gene_subset[!duplicated(tx2gene_subset$TXNAME), ]

  txi_single <- tximport(salmon_file,
                          type = "salmon",
                          tx2gene = tx2gene_subset,
                          ignoreTxVersion = TRUE)

  write.csv(txi_single$counts,    file.path(output_dir, paste0(sample, "_counts.csv")))
  write.csv(txi_single$abundance, file.path(output_dir, paste0(sample, "_abundance.csv")))

  cat("Exported counts and abundance for", sample, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
# Merge all per-sample counts into one matrix
counts_files <- list.files(output_dir, pattern = "_counts.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

counts_list <- lapply(counts_files, function(f) {
  df <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE)
  colnames(df)[1] <- "GeneID"
  df
})
names(counts_list) <- gsub("_counts.csv", "", basename(counts_files))

counts_matrix <- Reduce(function(x, y) full_join(x, y, by = "GeneID"), counts_list)
colnames(counts_matrix)[-1] <- names(counts_list)

write.csv(counts_matrix, file.path(output_dir, "all_samples_counts_matrix.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
cat("Merged counts matrix exported\n")
```

```{r}
# Merge all per-sample abundance into one matrix
abundance_files <- list.files(output_dir, pattern = "_abundance.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

abundance_list <- lapply(abundance_files, function(f) {
  df <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE)
  colnames(df)[1] <- "GeneID"
  df
})
names(abundance_list) <- gsub("_abundance.csv", "", basename(abundance_files))

abundance_matrix <- Reduce(function(x, y) full_join(x, y, by = "GeneID"), abundance_list)
colnames(abundance_matrix)[-1] <- names(abundance_list)

write.csv(abundance_matrix, file.path(output_dir, "all_samples_abundance_matrix.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
cat("Merged abundance matrix exported\n")
```
